name: cc-plugins
description: touchskyer's Claude Code plugin collection — memory, content, orchestration, ops.

plugins.name: memex
plugins.description: Zettelkasten-based persistent memory for AI coding agents. Markdown + git sync, no vector DB.

plugins.name: logex
plugins.description: Turn Claude Code session transcripts into blog-style articles — narrative, not logs.

plugins.name: opc
plugins.description: One Person Company — a full team in a single skill. Adaptive agent orchestrator with 11 built-in roles.

plugins.name: opc-extensions
plugins.description: Extension skills and flow templates for OPC.

plugins.name: dreamworks
plugins.description: Full AI product pipeline — ideafactory, pitch, publish, orchestrator.

plugins.name: repo-advisors
plugins.description: Distilled architecture advisors for popular repos — installable as Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: ink-flow
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle content operations — write, review, publish, distribute, monitor across channels.

plugins.name: cli-x
plugins.description: Universal external platform interface — post content, manage subscriptions, collect data. MCP > CLI/API > Playwright priority chain.

plugins.name: cli-x-builder
plugins.description: Designer companion to cli-x — adds new platform adapters with auth strategies and anti-detection patterns.

plugins.name: session-recap
plugins.description: Generate a visual session recap infographic — Apple dark-theme, stats + narrative + self-reflection.

plugins.name: tooleval
plugins.description: Evaluate MCP server quality with automated checks — validate implementations, debug issues, pre-publish gates.
